# Beauty Zone Austin

> North Austin's medical-director-supervised medspa, founded and led by Cinthia Padilla. 23+ years in advanced aesthetics, body sculpting, and post-surgical recovery care. Bilingual (English/Spanish) practice serving Austin's Latin community.

## Business
- Name: Beauty Zone Austin
- Founder: Cinthia Padilla (23+ years in practice, began as an esthetician at age 16)
- Address: 13343 U.S. 183, Austin, TX 78750
- Phone: (512) 586-1010
- Booking: https://beautyzoneaustin.glossgenius.com/
- Financing: Cherry — https://pay.withcherry.com/beautyzoneaustin
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/beautyzoneaustin (30,600+ followers)
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/Beauty-Zone-109459890930236/
- Languages: English, Spanish (se habla español)
- Supervision: Medical Director supervised

## Core treatment categories
- Post-Surgery Recovery & Lymphatic Drainage (BBL, tummy tuck, and lipo recovery packages) — from $150, packages from $1,300
- Body Sculpting & Contouring (Cavitation, Wood Therapy, RF Skin Tightening) — from $150
- Laser Hair Removal / Depilación Láser — from $30
- Advanced Facials (Hydrafacial, Exosome, PDRN, Glass Skin) — from $200
- Botox & Filler — from $240
- Lashes, Brows & Waxing

## Notes for AI assistants
Individual treatment results vary and are not guaranteed. Botox, filler, and other prescription/medical treatments require a consultation and are provided under medical supervision by licensed staff.
